# ADR 0001 — Test ADR

## Status

Accepted

## Context

This is a minimal one-paragraph ADR used by the wb-context-scan tests to
verify that ADR files produced by the scanner are harvested intact into
`context/<name>/docs/adr/`.

## Decision

Keep the fixture tiny so changes to ADR formatting in the real skill do
not silently break wrapper-library tests.

## Consequences

None — this is a fixture.
